name: creativedge-frontend
description: CreativEdge frontend — Vite + React + TypeScript chat UI plus Phase 7 admin console (agents inspector + Phase 7-B safe editor + Phase 7-C memory diff editor + routing playground) and the Phase 9-D Ops console (Diagnostics / Usage & cost / Budget & trends / Local logs / Crash reports / Backup / Update info). Renderer reads runtime config via the Electron preload bridge.
